simt.message: SIMT API only supports ascend950pr_9599 (3510), current: {chip}

reg.message: regbase API only supports ascend950pr_9599 (3510), current: {chip}

aiv_generation.description: Only APIs with verified generic binary or scalar/tensor-dispatch signatures may use an automatic AIV skeleton. Other AIV APIs must be analyzed first and either use an explicit template choice or an API-specific UT.

aic_generation.description: Only APIs with a verified MMAD-like signature may use the automatic AIC skeleton. Other AIC APIs must be analyzed first and use an API-specific UT instead of a renamed MMAD body.

reg_generation.description: Automatic regbase UT generation is disabled until an executable register-family template has been verified. Placeholder bodies are not valid UT output.

simt_generation.description: Automatic SIMT UT generation is disabled until an executable SIMT-family template has been verified. Placeholder kernels and validation TODOs are not valid UT output.

c_api_generation.description: Automatic C API UT generation is disabled until an executable signature-family template has been verified against the target architecture. One vector mock shape must not be reused for unrelated signatures.

utils_generation.description: Automatic utils UT generation is disabled until an executable utils-family template has been verified. Runtime, compile-time, std, tiling, and context utilities must not share one generic skeleton.

token_usage.description: Report prompt/completion/total token usage when provided by the client or API. Local script generation does not consume LLM tokens by itself.

coverage.description: Report current Lines/Functions coverage from build/cov_report when available. If no report is provided or refreshed, record unavailable with reason.
